allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3456/eval?target=712C6EC4F6B9372F9F84C86F7F1EF025" -d "var closeBtns=document.querySelectorAll\('.ant-modal-close, .ant-modal .ant-btn'\); for\(var i=0;i<closeBtns.length;i++\){var t=closeBtns[i].textContent; if\(t.indexOf\('确定'\)>=0||t.indexOf\('确'\)>=0||t.indexOf\('OK'\)>=0||t.indexOf\('Cancel'\)>=0||t.indexOf\('取'\)>=0\){closeBtns[i].click\(\);break}} 'tried closing'")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3456/eval?target=A7115BCA042C1673CBA6E4AAD25EC756" -d "var inputs=document.querySelectorAll\('input:not\([type=hidden]\)'\); var result=[]; for\(var i=0;i<inputs.length;i++\){result.push\({id:inputs[i].id,type:inputs[i].type,placeholder:inputs[i].placeholder}\);} JSON.stringify\(result\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3456/eval?target=A7115BCA042C1673CBA6E4AAD25EC756" -d "var s=Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor\(window.HTMLInputElement.prototype,'value'\).set; var uri=document.getElementById\('uri'\); s.call\(uri,'localhost:7687'\); uri.dispatchEvent\(new Event\('input',{bubbles:true}\)\); var un=document.getElementById\('userName'\); s.call\(un,'admin'\); un.dispatchEvent\(new Event\('input',{bubbles:true}\)\); var pw=document.getElementById\('password'\); s.call\(pw,'73@TuGraph'\); pw.dispatchEvent\(new Event\('input',{bubbles:true}\)\); 'filled'")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3456/eval?target=A7115BCA042C1673CBA6E4AAD25EC756" -d "var el=document.querySelector\('[class*=graphName], [class*=projectName]'\); if\(!el\){var all=document.querySelectorAll\('*'\); for\(var i=0;i<all.length;i++\){if\(all[i].textContent.trim\(\)==='default'&&all[i].children.length===0\){el=all[i];break;}}} if\(el\){el.click\(\);'clicked default'}else{'not found'}")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3456/eval?target=A7115BCA042C1673CBA6E4AAD25EC756" -d "var links=document.querySelectorAll\('a, [class*=link], [class*=Link], .ant-menu-item, [class*=tab]'\); var out=[]; for\(var i=0;i<links.length;i++\){var t=links[i].textContent.trim\(\); if\(t&&t.length<20\)out.push\(i+':'+t+'|'+links[i].className?.toString\(\)?.substring\(0,40\)\);} JSON.stringify\(out\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3456/eval?target=A7115BCA042C1673CBA6E4AAD25EC756" -d "var all=document.querySelectorAll\('*'\); var found=[]; for\(var i=0;i<all.length;i++\){var el=all[i]; if\(el.children.length===0&&el.textContent.trim\(\)==='图查询'\){found.push\({idx:i,tag:el.tagName,href:el.href,parentTag:el.parentElement.tagName,parentClass:el.parentElement.className?.toString\(\)?.substring\(0,60\),clickable:el.onclick!==null||el.parentElement.onclick!==null}\);if\(found.length>=5\)break;}} JSON.stringify\(found\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3456/eval?target=A7115BCA042C1673CBA6E4AAD25EC756" -d "var editor=document.querySelector\('.CodeMirror'\); if\(editor\){'CodeMirror found';}else{var ta=document.querySelector\('textarea, [class*=editor], [class*=input], [class*=cypher]'\); ta?ta.tagName+':'+ta.className.toString\(\).substring\(0,60\):'no editor'}")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3456/eval?target=A7115BCA042C1673CBA6E4AAD25EC756" -d "var all=document.querySelectorAll\('textarea, [contenteditable], [class*=monaco], [class*=code], [class*=editor]'\); var out=[]; for\(var i=0;i<all.length;i++\){out.push\(i+':'+all[i].tagName+'|class='+all[i].className?.toString\(\)?.substring\(0,80\)+'|text='+all[i].textContent?.trim\(\)?.substring\(0,50\)\);} JSON.stringify\(out\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:3456/eval?target=A7115BCA042C1673CBA6E4AAD25EC756" -d "var editors=monaco.editor.getEditors\(\); if\(editors.length>0\){editors[0].setValue\('CREATE\\\\n  \(home:Page {name:\\\\'Home\\\\'}\),\\\\n  \(about:Page {name:\\\\'About\\\\'}\),\\\\n  \(product:Page {name:\\\\'Product\\\\'}\),\\\\n  \(links:Page {name:\\\\'Links\\\\'}\),\\\\n  \(a:Page {name:\\\\'Site A\\\\'}\),\\\\n  \(b:Page {name:\\\\'Site B\\\\'}\),\\\\n  \(c:Page {name:\\\\'Site C\\\\'}\),\\\\n  \(d:Page {name:\\\\'Site D\\\\'}\),\\\\n  \(home\)-[:LINKS {weight: 0.2}]->\(about\),\\\\n  \(home\)-[:LINKS {weight: 0.2}]->\(links\),\\\\n  \(home\)-[:LINKS {weight: 0.6}]->\(product\),\\\\n  \(about\)-[:LINKS {weight: 1.0}]->\(home\),\\\\n  \(product\)-[:LINKS {weight: 1.0}]->\(home\),\\\\n  \(a\)-[:LINKS {weight: 1.0}]->\(home\),\\\\n  \(b\)-[:LINKS {weight: 1.0}]->\(home\),\\\\n  \(c\)-[:LINKS {weight: 1.0}]->\(home\),\\\\n  \(d\)-[:LINKS {weight: 1.0}]->\(home\),\\\\n  \(links\)-[:LINKS {weight: 0.8}]->\(home\),\\\\n  \(links\)-[:LINKS {weight: 0.05}]->\(a\),\\\\n  \(links\)-[:LINKS {weight: 0.05}]->\(b\),\\\\n  \(links\)-[:LINKS {weight: 0.05}]->\(c\),\\\\n  \(links\)-[:LINKS {weight: 0.05}]->\(d\);'\); 'set ok'}else{'no monaco'}")
